title: achasma walang
intro: Achasma walang is a type of plant native to the Philippines, commonly known as the "plant that never dries" due to its ability to retain moisture. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by drying and mixing the plant's leaves or roots with other herbs.
